name: Xaku
description: Broken Warframes adrift in the Void converged to create Xaku. Together, they deal high damage. Xaku proves that the sum of the whole is greater than its parts.
passiveDescription: |CHANCE|% Damage Reduction on AOE attacks and chance to avoid incoming weapon damage.

abilities.name: Xata's Whisper
abilities.description: Wield <DT_RADIANT_COLOR>Void Damage for all attacks from equipped weapons when activated.

abilities.name: Grasp Of Lohk
abilities.description: Void Tendrils steal weapons from nearby enemies to use as your own floating, auto-targeting armament. Damage output increases based on enemy level. The number of weapons grabbed also determines the damage multiplier for The Lost: Deny's Void beam.

abilities.name: The Lost
abilities.description: Cycle through a trio of lost Warframe powers. Accuse manifests a Void fissure to corrupt enemies into allies. Gaze grasps targets in Void tendrils that capture damage and inflict it when the target is released. Deny annihilates with a beam of Void energy, wiping Sentient resistances.

abilities.name: The Vast Untime
abilities.description: Temporarily shed the outer pieces of Xaku in a destructive blast, then stalk the battlefield in a new, swifter skeletal form. Enemies damaged by the body shrapnel are rendered weaker to <DT_RADIANT_COLOR>Void Damage. Xaku's other active abilities' duration is frozen in time and resumes once The Vast Untime expires.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.4
patchlogs.changes: The tail on Xaku Kagura Helmet will no longer appear on Xaku generated Kuva Liches to fix many clipping issues.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed clipping issues with the Eos (base and Prime) Shoulder Plates when equipped on Xaku’s Kagura Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Added a pulsing glow FX to Xaku’s unused The Lost abilities while The Relentless Lost Augment Mod is equipped.
patchlogs.fixes:
The Xaku Kagura Skin is available for purchase in the in-game Market.
Fixed Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk sound FX being choppy if Range Mods are equipped.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash with Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk while using the Vampiric Grasp Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s ‘Cold’ Elemental Ward applying a large damage multiplier bonus to bullets that hit an absorb/redirect volume (Xaku’s Whisper or Mag’s Magnetize).

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Xaku

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue of recasting Vast Untime on Xaku consuming a charge of Inner Might but not reducing the casting cost.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Xaku being unable to cast the Vast Untime if they have no Energy available while Inner Might is active.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Xaku’s Last Grasp ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
While Overguard is active, it will keep Eximus units immune to Warframe crowd control abilities and anything that will stagger, knockdown, stun, mind control, ragdoll, and blind. Additionally, Overguarded enemies will be unaffected by Radiation Status Effects and will be susceptible to a maximum of 4 Cold Status Effects at one time. However, Overguard is particularly susceptible to Void damage (including Xaku’s Xata’s Whisper), which will overall improve the flow and synergy between Warframe and Operator combat flow when engaging with Eximus units. This will encourage you to engage with them more interactively as opposed to easily overpowering them with abilities alone. It should shift the focus of fighting Eximus units to using a mixture of weapons and teamwork, and make Eximus units feel like more of a true threat to Warframes.
Xaku’s The Lost
Enemies that are not affected by CC can now be armor stripped by Banshee’s Sonic Boom, Xaku’s Gaze, and Ember’s Fire Blast.
patchlogs.fixes: Xaku's Xata's Whisper

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies held by Xaku’s Gaze attempting to attack friendly units (Specters, Crewmates, or other players' companions).

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Disarming an enemy who is held by Xaku Gaze, Loki Radial Disarm, Baruuk Desolate Hands & Serene Storm, Naramon Disarming Blast, Mag Magnetized Discharge Augment, or Kubrow Neutralize results in them counting as a required kill for mission progress.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.additions: Lavos, Sevagoth, Xaku, Yareli, Baruuk, Gauss, Hildryn, Wisp, Protea and Grendel are now available and can be used in Frame Fighter once their Fragments have been found/Scanned.
patchlogs.changes:
Arm yourself with these new Warframe Augments for Trinity, Lavos, and Xaku!
When a stolen weapon deals damage to an enemy affected by The Lost: Gaze or The Vast Untime, Xaku heals by 25.
Fixed a gap between the casting animation with Xaku’s Gaze and freezing the target, which allowed them to die before they were affected by Gaze. 
Fixed Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk weapons having glitchy animations.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a broken Text String for Xaku’s Blueprint information in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku, Titania and Gara not having a Blueprint hint button in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to the Simulacrum and Xaku.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to release a target from Xaku’s Gaze if you don't have Energy.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Hotfix 30.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tyro Battalyst's disarm behavior; they don't actually support this so it would generate a script error in a variety of cases (ie Loki’s Radial Disarm, Xaku’s Grasp of Lokh, etc).

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when Xaku’s Passive triggers.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lavos and Xaku custom ability HUD overlapping Melee Combo Counter when dual wielding.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur being on display instead of Xaku when viewing the Xaku Collection in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Xaku’s hand positions and left arm in their Agile and Noble animation sets.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Intermission III: Update 29.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Added Lavos Cordatus, Mag Gauss, Protea Mavv, Protea Telema, and Xaku Kintsu Helmet Blueprints to the Nightwave Store rotation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 29.5.8
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk ability becoming non-functional is cast too rapidly. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1238057-xakus-graps-glitch/
Fixed Client squadmates not seeing the Host Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk weapons expire.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.7
patchlogs.changes: Lowered Xaku Grasp of Lohk ability sounds.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed recasting Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk with no targets nearby resulting in all guns to be lost.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
We’ve been keeping tabs on the usual feedback channels to read and review your takes on Xaku in their updated form. We have been pleased to see that generally these changes have been enjoyed thus far, and that we’ve taken a step in the right direction. But as many have expressed, and to which we have found ourselves agreeing, our work is not done yet on this Community Warframe!
So here we are with a second round of changes based on the most standout and widely discussed points we saw strewn across the feedback hubs. Whether it's iterating on Round 1 or offering new insight on Xaku’s abilities, we thank you for sharing!
Xaku's "The Lost" ability description will now include descriptions of "Accuse", "Deny", and "Gaze" within it.
Currently, Deny’s casting animation locks Xaku in place. While we did increase the casting speed in Round 1, it just simply was not enough to fulfill the parkour freedom you’ve become well familiar with in Warframe. Removing the lock brings back the ninja fantasy while also making the most of the synergy between Deny and Grasp of Lohk that we added in Round 1. As we said in our first Xaku Dev Workshop, “more firepower… faster”, but this time we really mean it!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Xaku’s Xata’s Whisper sometimers not applying its damage buff or Void Status Effect when using the Komorex. 
Fixed Xaku’s Xata’s Whisper not using the intended Status Chance for projectile weapons. 
Fixed the HUD timer icon for Xata’s Whisper in the top right corner ticking down  regardless of The Vast Untime being active. This was only a visual bug, and did not actually affect the ‘time freezing’ synergy with The Vast Untime and Xaku’s other abilities.
Fixed Xaku’s skin not being properly localized. 
Fixed Xaku missing their head and armor when viewed in the Mods Tutorial screens.
Fixed camera obstruction and misaligned aiming if Xaku’s Grasp creates a Shedu armament.
Fixed missing bow animations when equipped with Xaku. 
Fixed constructing Xaku in the Foundry resulting in the hologram for the Mire appearing, rather than Xaku's helmet.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated Ivara's Quiver, Vauban's Minelayer, Xaku's The Lost, and Titania's Tribute ability descriptions to list the sub-abilities and a brief general description of what they do. Tips related to these sub-abilities for each Warframe have also been edited for accuracy as a result.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.1.2 + Hotfix 29.1.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the audible distance of Xaku’s weapon sounds in the Grasp of Lohk ability use.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Keeping within the realm of the “community-created Warframe” project, Xaku has received numerous changes based on your feedback! We welcome your feedback post launch in the official Dev Workshop: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1223976-upcoming-xaku-changes/

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku's base slow of The Vast Untime being 50% instead of intended 15% at Level 2. As reported here!

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.changes:
Xaku’s Gaze ability has been added to the Railjack Tactical Menu. 
Xaku will now hide their Syandana and Armor pieces during their The Vast Untime ability to prevent floating objects.
Note: we are about 1 week away from a full Community feedback pass on Xaku’s abilities. Sit tight!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku’s Vast Untime ability not always damaging enemies within radius.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku’s ‘Vast Untime’ damaging Teralysts and Variants. As mentioned at TennoCon, this is not intended.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Added Xaku Blueprint to Cephalon Simaris Offerings for those who have completed the Heart of Deimos Quest.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Xaku’s Accuse ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Xaku’s Grasp of Lohk ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes:
If you buy Xaku with Platinum, you will receive a Riven Mod as a quest Reward in addition to the Xaku Blueprint.
play them to earn new Rewards (including Xaku’s Components)!
Created by the community in the Community Created Warframe project from theme to aesthetic to Abilities. Xaku’s concept art was made by community fan artist Eornheit!
Similarly to Equinox, a toggle is available in the Arsenal to see Xaku in their “The Vast Untime” form.
